name: unicity-aos
description: Connect Codex to Unicity AOS with governed capsule tools, health checks, policy hooks, and a principal-scoped identity.

interface.longDescription: Adds Unicity AOS operating instructions, capsule tools over MCP, a SessionStart health check, and policy hooks for a principal-scoped Codex agent.
defaultPrompt: Use Unicity AOS tools for governed agent operations.
